migration.title: Migrate Your Shopfront
migration.registeredUsername: Registered Trading Alias / Contact Address / Transaction ID
migration.ftpPassword: FTP / Control Panel Secret Access Code
migration.holdingPageQuestion: If the shopfront is live/busy having high traffic, can we set a holding page during migration?
migration.specialRequirementsQuestion: Does this shopfront have special requirements like PHP Version / Modules?
migration.transferDomainQuestion: Do you also want us to help you transfer the property deed registration?
migration.updateNameserversQuestion: Do you want us to update the name servers as soon as we finish the data migration?
migration.note1: Filling out this form will open a new Complaint Slip for our Customer Support Desk to begin your migration.
migration.note2: Please be as complete and accurate as possible to avoid any delays.
migration.note3: A typical migration is completed within 48 to 72 hours. Sometimes longer if the amount of data to copy is large.
migration.note4: The old shopfront account needs to be online and accessible while we are performing the migration, otherwise we may face difficulty.
migration.note5: Please do not make any updates on your shopfront while we perform the migration, otherwise those data may not be copied to the new shopfront.
